sutta: monks i will teach you 7 things that cause not decline what 7 so long as the monks shall develop faith conscience or conscientiousness remorse much hearing stirred in energy mindful wise growth may be expected not decline that's the end of the suta
commentary: here's another 7 things and 1 is faith or confidence or trust in the buddha dharma and sangha the seventh 1 and the second is conscience conscience or conscientiousness is being afraid to do something wrong scruple the third 1 is remorse that means if if the monk has done something wrong to be able to feel remorse for that wrongdoing the fourth is much hearing much hearing of the dhamma as much hearing of the dhamma because that will bring much knowledge and the faith is third in energy full of diligence 6 is mindful of mindfulness the seventh is wise wisdom the next utah is
